segments.original_text: キックが出ちゃったな

segments.text: If you flip and the kick pops out on the outside
segments.original_text: フリップを出して外側にキックが出ちゃうと

segments.text: The follow-ups don't work after that
segments.original_text: その後の派生が効かなくなる

segments.text: Now at 2, 3 stocks—this is a tense moment
segments.original_text: さあストック2,3この緊張の場面

segments.text: One mistake will show, but Tweek...
segments.original_text: 一つのミスは出るでしょうしかしツイーク

full_text: The kick came out! If you flip and the kick pops out on the outside the follow-ups don't work after that That's rare! Now at 2, 3 stocks—this is a tense moment One mistake will show, but Tweek...
